TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Taluku kanatal aidangan "Taluku a kamu Rngayan qmita kana klwaan Truku" nu Cung-hwa-min-kow sakasepat a buyu' patizeng tu kanatal aidangan. sakatusa tabakiay a kalalais nu kitakit zikuz kanatalay nu hekalay aazihan, 1986 a mihca 11 a demiad 12 a bulad pasakamu milekakawaw, 1986 a mihcaan 11 a bulad 28 a demiad patizeng tu pikuwanan. tini i sawalian, u lala' milakuit tu Kaingku, Tayciw kuwan, Nan-tow a kuwan tulu ku sakawawan. labu nu aidangan izaw ku nu Taywan saayaway maawasay tu wili satip matatus a zazan, pamgamgam ahn cung-hen zazan. Taluk kanatal aidangan masazumaay u diheb atu tepad, u tepad masaapilis, bangcal nayi' ku alawaw, "Taluku masatezep ku diheb" makayni asingangan ku Taywan tu walu hekalay aazihan. caay kuyni, labu nu aidangan buyu'ay yadah ku maliwan a kuliay sauwac a zidayan nu mauzipay, mahiniay buyu' daydam buting. "Taluk kanatal aidangan" talakaw tepatepadan,masatukal ku sauwac nu lala', ahebal ku sacumud nu sauwac macungdasay masaupu masapihpih atu diheb ku kasahiza nu lala'. matatungus nu niliwanan a zaysang nu kitait nipatahkal tatungus sakapitu siyang, atu lala' tulin misaungay talakaw tapabaw, masanga' ku Taluk diheb kibetul talakaw ku hekal aazihan. Mauzipay yadah ku mahicahicaan atu micidekay matatungus nu niliwanan a zaysang nu kitait nipatahkal tatungus tu sakasiwa syang, caay uyni dada',uyni a kitizaan caaynay kapeci' nu tademaw nuyaanay nu mulangaway atu kilakilangan, mihibangan a aadupan a lamangan atu kayayadah, masasuida, matatungu nu niliwanan a zaysang nu kitait nipatahkal tatungus tu saka cacay a bataan syang, sakasa mapili' tu lalangawan tu Taywan kitakit niliwanan a zaysang nu cayay katahkal a icelang. "Taluku" anca "Taluku" uyni a kamu nu Talukucu anipangangan tu "Truku". 16 se-ci tu teban, Seydeyk a tademaw namakayza i Nan-to milakuit tu cung-yang-gan-may malimad mueneng i Kalingku a Takidis Maelil a sauwac, zikuc mueneng i Kalingku a binacadan a patateng', u "Tayluku" kaku sa. uyaan a ngiha "Truku", pikuwanan nu Lipun pangangan han "Taroku" Tayluku a ngangan, zayhan mueneng itini pangangan hantu Tayluku Taluku kanatal aidangan lekakawaw saayaway panukas tu nu ayaway pikuwanan nu Lipun a ziday. 1937 a mihca 12 a buad 27 a demiad, Taywan cung-tu-bu kanatal aidangan wi-yen-huy pasakamu "Taluku kanatal aidangan" patizedng, pasu ayzaay a sye-san atu aluku alala', u hekal katukuh 27 emang kung-cin, nika zayhan pikuwanan nu Lipun mapahezek a palasawaden. 2024 a mihca 4 a bulad 3 a demiad Kalingku manileng maduka t uku Taluku kanatal aidangan, zuma Cuy-lu a zazan, Te-lun a zazan, Yen-ce a zazan, Sa-tutang a zazan, Pay-yang a zazan atu C-mu-sangaw zazan hatiza ku aazihan au malalitin tu likutay a zaza ku nikapelad, mapatay tuku pinaay tu nu midangay a labang atu macapi tu malebut nu midangay a labang malubu i labu nu aidangan. uyza a demiad namalineng Taluku kanatal aidangan mukuwanay pasakamu deban tu ku aidangan sa, misakapah a kawaw kaliyuhan a ayaan, aidangan maedeb katukuh akapah tu sasa platuh a mibuhat. 2024ŚĻī4śúą3śó•, . hekal nu tahak Ťá™ÁĄ∂ÁíįŚĘÉ Taluku kanatal aidangan sawali micapi tu walibayu, cang-yang-san-may amis a ngatu micaliway tu aidangan, aidangan u satalakaway a buyu' 3,742 depah a Nan-hu-ta-san. tulu malebut katalakaw nu buyu' cuedet ku kitizaan u hekal macalap ku liwliw nu kanatal aidanngan tu 7.25% pesen, pasiluc tu ngangan Taywan Py-ye a buyu'mapulung 27 a buyu'an, cacay malebut depah katukuh tulu depah nu alababay kitizaan a buyu' macalap hamina kitizaan 78.4% pesen, matukinih 55% pesan uyni a kitizaan macalap ku 44.7 % pesen ku aidangnan. duduc tu nikinsaan, labu nu aidangan maazih ku aadupan 1,517 alamangan. aidangan izaw ku 46 a lamangan ku micucuay, mcalap ku nu Taywan tukusay pangkiw ku micucucay aadupan. izaw ku 15 a lamangan tungus micidekay nu Taywan aadupan, Taywan nu kilakilangan a edu ahebal ku nikaliwasak. aidangan a ayam saadidi'ay izaw ku 173 a lamangan, pasu hamin nu Taywan micidekay a ayaman 24 a lamangan numa maliwasak i cung-hen zazan Ta-i-lin katukuh Cen-en sayadahay a ayaman itiza. tiniay maazih yadah ku icuwacuwaay a niliwanan a naenengan, tini i Takidis kawana tukus sacumud nu sauwac, Taluku ayaw a paya nu luma' 100 depah pabaw nu satukal a sauwac, micapi tu Taluku kanatal aidangan pilekawaan nu Bu-se niliwanan a naenengan, laed katukuh aayza 2,000 a mihcaan a likisi. labu nu kanatal aidangan Talukucu a niyacu'kaliwasak nu kitizaan, caay kapina ku muenengan, zuma a niyazu' tu malumanay a nikitizaan nayi' tu ku muenengay He-hwan-cin-bung satipan nukanatal aidangan, micapi tu pitu abuyu'an matatules, zuma lima a buyu' singanganay nu Taywan Pay-ye Kilay buyu' tini i satipan nu kanatal aidangan, u talakaw 3,607 depah. Kila buyu' maapilis ku tepah katalawaw a singangan, Taywan u yadahay ku labades a buyu', sisa izaw ku "lumeni'ay Kilay" anipangangan. Ta-pa-cyen-san tini i saamisan nu kanatal aidangan,u talakaw 3,705 depah, sakasepat saatalakaway nu Cung-yang-san-may, atu Ta-pa-cyen-san, Ta-ben-cyen-san pulunng a ngangan "san-cyen", u satalakaway ku san-cyen. . Nan-bu-ta-san tini i saamisan nu kanatal aidangang, u talakaw 3,742 depah. atu I-san, Sye-san,Siw-ku-lan-san, saamisan Ta-u-san pulung a ngnangan "u-I", Taywan nu sitatungusay lima a buyu'an nu talakaway a buyu'. Taluku nisanga'an tu talakaway cuked, Taluku nisanga'an tu talakaway cuked mahiza micumuday tu cung-hen a zazan u piazihan a nipatizengan, u labang tayza i Taluku a diheban I teban nu zazan amihibang pasasing. . Cang-cun-ce nipatizeng u nu Cowng-kow sumamaday Tang a ziday izaw i putah ku pahanhanan miazih wayway, miduduc tu capiay a lala' tu maapilisay nu laed, nicidek ku bangcal. tingalaway nemnem a nanum makay tepatepadan tahkal, masacacay seday mulesi' tasasa, tumihcaan caay kapihibang, masa u "Cang-cun-bey-paw" cung-hen a zazan nu kapahay a piazihan. Yan-c-kow nu Taluku a diheb cacangatu u ba'tu ku tepad, tepad yadah ku adidi'ay a buhang, zayhan hina izaw ku adidi'ay udad padaicaw, yang padaicaw i tepad mikilim tu kakanen ancaysa m isadibu, masa "pay-yen-min-ku" u micidekay aazihan, amala "padaicaw laway" tu. ciw-ci-tung cung-pu hen-kwan a zazan tini mibuhang a patizang, masa yadahay mangangiway a buhang, pangangan tu "Ciw-ci-cung". ,śēÖÁ®Ī"šĻĚśõ≤śīě". Tyen-syang labu nu kitizaan misanga' tu "Tyen-syang yu-ke-cung-sin", atu basu, yubim, Cin-hwa-ciw-ten, Tyen-syang cin-nyen-hu-tung-cung-sin mipawapen tu kakanen atu pilabinan. Ci-suy-twan-ay tini i Ci-suy walian buyu', u talakaw 1000 depah. sakawalu nu tabakiay aazihan nu Taywan. He-ban buyu' kasienawan salenga'c sa ku suleda "mahiniay "suleda niyazu'" a ngangan. ,Áī†śúČ"ťõ™ťĄČ"šĻčÁ®Ī. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan "tar~…ĺuku a kamu *Ňčajan *mita kana kr~…ĺwaan truku" nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kow sakas…ôpat a buju Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan. sakatusa tabakiaj a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais nu kitakit zikuz kanatar~…ĺaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj aazińßan, **** a mińß ¶a ** a d…ômiad ** a bur~…ĺad pasakamu mir~…ĺ…ôkakawaw, **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad patiz…ôŇč tu pikuwanan. tini i sawar~…ĺian, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mir~…ĺakuit tu kaiŇčku, taj ¶iw kuwan, nan-tow a kuwan tur~…ĺu ku sakawawan. r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan izaw ku nu tajwan saajawaj maawasaj tu wir~…ĺi satip matatus a zazan, pamgamgam ańßn ¶uŇč-ńß…ôn zazan. tar~…ĺuk kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan masazumaaj u dińß…ôb atu t…ôpad, u t…ôpad masaapir~…ĺis, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ naji Ē~ ° ku ar~…ĺawaw, "tar~…ĺuku masat…ôz…ôp ku dińß…ôb" makajni asiŇčaŇčan ku tajwan tu war~…ĺu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj aazińßan. ¶aaj kujni, r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan buju Ē~ °aj jadańß ku mar~…ĺiwan a kur~…ĺiaj sauwa ¶ a zidajan nu mauzipaj, mańßiniaj buju Ē~ ° dajdam butiŇč. "tar~…ĺuk kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan" tar~…ĺakaw t…ôpat…ôpadan,masatukar~…ĺ ku sauwa ¶ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku sa ¶umud nu sauwa ¶ ma ¶uŇčdasaj masaupu masapińßpińß atu dińß…ôb ku kasańßiza nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. matatuŇčus nu nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč nu kitait nipatańßkar~…ĺ tatuŇčus sakapitu sijaŇč, atu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tur~…ĺin misauŇčaj tar~…ĺakaw tapabaw, masaŇča Ē~ ° ku tar~…ĺuk dińß…ôb kib…ôtur~…ĺ tar~…ĺakaw ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ aazińßan. mauzipaj jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aan atu mi ¶id…ôkaj matatuŇčus nu nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč nu kitait nipatańßkar~…ĺ tatuŇčus tu sakasiwa sjaŇč, ¶aaj ujni dada Ē~ °,ujni a kitizaan ¶aajnaj kap…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw nujaanaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, mińßibaŇčan a aadupan a r~…ĺamaŇčan atu kajajadańß, masasuida, matatuŇču nu nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč nu kitait nipatańßkar~…ĺ tatuŇčus tu saka ¶a ¶aj a bataan sjaŇč, sakasa mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tu tajwan kitakit nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč nu ¶ajaj katańßkar~…ĺ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. "tar~…ĺuku" an ¶a "tar~…ĺuku" ujni a kamu nu tar~…ĺuku ¶u anipaŇčaŇčan tu "truku". ** s…ô- ¶i tu t…ôban, s…ôd…ôk a tad…ômaw namakajza i nan-to mir~…ĺakuit tu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-gan-maj mar~…ĺimad mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku a takidis ma…ôr~…ĺir~…ĺ a sauwa ¶, ziku ¶ mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku a bina ¶adan a patat…ôŇč Ē~ °, u "tajr~…ĺuku" kaku sa. ujaan a Ňčińßa "truku", pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun paŇčaŇčan ńßan "taroku" tajr~…ĺuku a ŇčaŇčan, zajńßan mu…ôn…ôŇč itini paŇčaŇčan ńßantu tajr~…ĺuku tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw saajawaj panukas tu nu ajawaj pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun a zidaj. **** a mińß ¶a ** a buad ** a d…ômiad, tajwan ¶uŇč-tu-bu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan wi-j…ôn-ńßuj pasakamu "tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan" patiz…ôdŇč, pasu ajzaaj a sj…ô-san atu ar~…ĺuku ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ katukuńß ** …ômaŇč kuŇč- ¶in, nika zajńßan pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun mapańß…ôz…ôk a par~…ĺasawad…ôn. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad kar~…ĺiŇčku manir~…ĺ…ôŇč maduka t uku tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, zuma ¶uj-r~…ĺu a zazan, t…ô-r~…ĺun a zazan, j…ôn- ¶…ô a zazan, sa-tutaŇč a zazan, paj-jaŇč a zazan atu ¶-mu-saŇčaw zazan ńßatiza ku aazińßan au mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu r~…ĺikutaj a zaza ku nikap…ôr~…ĺad, mapataj tuku pinaaj tu nu midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč atu ma ¶api tu mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč mar~…ĺubu i r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan. ujza a d…ômiad namar~…ĺin…ôŇč tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan mukuwanaj pasakamu d…ôban tu ku aidaŇčan sa, misakapańß a kawaw kar~…ĺijuńßan a ajaan, aidaŇčan ma…ôd…ôb katukuńß akapańß tu sasa pr~…ĺatuńß a mibuńßat. *********, . ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tańßak **** tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan sawar~…ĺi mi ¶api tu war~…ĺibaju, ¶aŇč-jaŇč-san-maj amis a Ňčatu mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu aidaŇčan, aidaŇčan u satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° *,*** d…ôpańß a nan-ńßu-ta-san. tur~…ĺu mar~…ĺ…ôbut katar~…ĺakaw nu buju Ē~ ° ¶u…ôd…ôt ku kitizaan u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu kanatar~…ĺ aidanŇčan tu *.**% p…ôs…ôn, pasir~…ĺu ¶ tu ŇčaŇčan tajwan pj-j…ô a buju Ē~ °mapur~…ĺuŇč ** a buju Ē~ °an, ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺ…ôbut d…ôpańß katukuńß tur~…ĺu d…ôpańß nu ar~…ĺababaj kitizaan a buju Ē~ ° ma ¶ar~…ĺap ńßamina kitizaan **.*% p…ôs…ôn, matukinińß **% p…ôsan ujni a kitizaan ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku **.* % p…ôs…ôn ku aidaŇčnan. dudu ¶ tu nikinsaan, r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan maazińß ku aadupan *,*** ar~…ĺamaŇčan. aidaŇčan izaw ku ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku mi ¶u ¶uaj, m ¶ar~…ĺap ku nu tajwan tukusaj paŇčkiw ku mi ¶u ¶u ¶aj aadupan. izaw ku ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan tuŇčus mi ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan aadupan, tajwan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a …ôdu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nikar~…ĺiwasak. aidaŇčan a ajam saadidi Ē~ °aj izaw ku *** a r~…ĺamaŇčan, pasu ńßamin nu tajwan mi ¶id…ôkaj a ajaman ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan numa mar~…ĺiwasak i ¶uŇč-ńß…ôn zazan ta-i-r~…ĺin katukuńß ¶…ôn-…ôn sajadańßaj a ajaman itiza. tiniaj maazińß jadańß ku i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a nir~…ĺiwanan a na…ôn…ôŇčan, tini i takidis kawana tukus sa ¶umud nu sauwa ¶, tar~…ĺuku ajaw a paja nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° *** d…ôpańß pabaw nu satukar~…ĺ a sauwa ¶, mi ¶api tu tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan pir~…ĺ…ôkawaan nu bu-s…ô nir~…ĺiwanan a na…ôn…ôŇčan, r~…ĺa…ôd katukuńß aajza *,*** a mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺikisi. r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan tar~…ĺuku ¶u a nija ¶u Ē~ °kar~…ĺiwasak nu kitizaan, ¶aaj kapina ku mu…ôn…ôŇčan, zuma a nijazu Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺumanaj a nikitizaan naji Ē~ ° tu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj ńß…ô-ńßwan- ¶in-buŇč satipan nukanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, mi ¶api tu pitu abuju Ē~ °an matatur~…ĺ…ôs, zuma r~…ĺima a buju Ē~ ° siŇčaŇčanaj nu tajwan paj-j…ô kir~…ĺaj buju Ē~ ° tini i satipan nu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, u tar~…ĺakaw *,*** d…ôpańß. kir~…ĺa buju Ē~ ° maapir~…ĺis ku t…ôpańß katar~…ĺawaw a siŇčaŇčan, tajwan u jadańßaj ku r~…ĺabad…ôs a buju Ē~ °, sisa izaw ku "r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj kir~…ĺaj" anipaŇčaŇčan. ta-pa- ¶j…ôn-san tini i saamisan nu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan,u tar~…ĺakaw *,*** d…ôpańß, sakas…ôpat saatar~…ĺakawaj nu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj, atu ta-pa- ¶j…ôn-san, ta-b…ôn- ¶j…ôn-san pur~…ĺunŇč a ŇčaŇčan "san- ¶j…ôn", u satar~…ĺakawaj ku san- ¶j…ôn. . nan-bu-ta-san tini i saamisan nu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčaŇč, u tar~…ĺakaw *,*** d…ôpańß. atu i-san, sj…ô-san,siw-ku-r~…ĺan-san, saamisan ta-u-san pur~…ĺuŇč a ŇčnaŇčan "u-i", tajwan nu sitatuŇčusaj r~…ĺima a buju Ē~ °an nu tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °. tar~…ĺuku nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu tar~…ĺakawaj ¶uk…ôd, tar~…ĺuku nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu tar~…ĺakawaj ¶uk…ôd mańßiza mi ¶umudaj tu ¶uŇč-ńß…ôn a zazan u piazińßan a nipatiz…ôŇčan, u r~…ĺabaŇč tajza i tar~…ĺuku a dińß…ôban i t…ôban nu zazan amińßibaŇč pasasiŇč. . ¶aŇč- ¶un- ¶…ô nipatiz…ôŇč u nu ¶owŇč-kow sumamadaj taŇč a zidaj izaw i putańß ku pańßanńßanan miazińß wajwaj, midudu ¶ tu ¶apiaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu maapir~…ĺisaj nu r~…ĺa…ôd, ni ¶id…ôk ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. tiŇčar~…ĺawaj n…ômn…ôm a nanum makaj t…ôpat…ôpadan tańßkar~…ĺ, masa ¶a ¶aj s…ôdaj mur~…ĺ…ôsi Ē~ ° tasasa, tumińß ¶aan ¶aaj kapińßibaŇč, masa u " ¶aŇč- ¶un-b…ô-paw" ¶uŇč-ńß…ôn a zazan nu kapańßaj a piazińßan. jan- ¶-kow nu tar~…ĺuku a dińß…ôb ¶a ¶aŇčatu u ba Ē~ °tu ku t…ôpad, t…ôpad jadańß ku adidi Ē~ °aj a buńßaŇč, zajńßan ńßina izaw ku adidi Ē~ °aj udad padai ¶aw, jaŇč padai ¶aw i t…ôpad mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn an ¶ajsa m isadibu, masa "paj-j…ôn-min-ku" u mi ¶id…ôkaj aazińßan, amar~…ĺa "padai ¶aw r~…ĺawaj" tu. ¶iw- ¶i-tuŇč ¶uŇč-pu ńß…ôn-kwan a zazan tini mibuńßaŇč a patizaŇč, masa jadańßaj maŇčaŇčiwaj a buńßaŇč, paŇčaŇčan tu " ¶iw- ¶i- ¶uŇč". ,**"***". tj…ôn-sjaŇč r~…ĺabu nu kitizaan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu "tj…ôn-sjaŇč ju-k…ô- ¶uŇč-sin", atu basu, jubim, ¶in-ńßwa- ¶iw-t…ôn, tj…ôn-sjaŇč ¶in-nj…ôn-ńßu-tuŇč- ¶uŇč-sin mipawap…ôn tu kakan…ôn atu pir~…ĺabinan. ¶i-suj-twan-aj tini i ¶i-suj war~…ĺian buju Ē~ °, u tar~…ĺakaw **** d…ôpańß. sakawar~…ĺu nu tabakiaj aazińßan nu tajwan. ńß…ô-ban buju Ē~ ° kasi…ônawan sar~…ĺ…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶ sa ku sur~…ĺ…ôda "mańßiniaj "sur~…ĺ…ôda nijazu Ē~ °" a ŇčaŇčan. ,**"**"**. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Taluku kanatal aidangan "Taluku a kamu Rngayan qmita kana klwaan Truku" nu Cung-hwa-min-kow sakasepat a buyu' patizeng tu kanatal aidangan. sakatusa tabakiay a kalalais nu kitakit zikuz kanatalay nu hekalay aazihan, 1986 a mihca 11 a demiad 12 a bulad pasakamu milekakawaw, 1986 a mihcaan 11 a bulad 28 a demiad patizeng tu pikuwanan. tini i sawalian, u lala' milakuit tu Kaingku, Tayciw kuwan, Nan-tow a kuwan tulu ku sakawawan. labu nu aidangan izaw ku nu Taywan saayaway maawasay tu wili satip matatus a zazan, pamgamgam ahn cung-hen zazan. Taluk kanatal aidangan masazumaay u diheb atu tepad, u tepad masaapilis, bangcal nayi' ku alawaw, "Taluku masatezep ku diheb" makayni asingangan ku Taywan tu walu hekalay aazihan. caay kuyni, labu nu aidangan buyu'ay yadah ku maliwan a kuliay sauwac a zidayan nu mauzipay, mahiniay buyu' daydam buting. "Taluk kanatal aidangan" talakaw tepatepadan,masatukal ku sauwac nu lala', ahebal ku sacumud nu sauwac macungdasay masaupu masapihpih atu diheb ku kasahiza nu lala'. matatungus nu niliwanan a zaysang nu kitait nipatahkal tatungus sakapitu siyang, atu lala' tulin misaungay talakaw tapabaw, masanga' ku Taluk diheb kibetul talakaw ku hekal aazihan. Mauzipay yadah ku mahicahicaan atu micidekay matatungus nu niliwanan a zaysang nu kitait nipatahkal tatungus tu sakasiwa syang, caay uyni dada',uyni a kitizaan caaynay kapeci' nu tademaw nuyaanay nu mulangaway atu kilakilangan, mihibangan a aadupan a lamangan atu kayayadah, masasuida, matatungu nu niliwanan a zaysang nu kitait nipatahkal tatungus tu saka cacay a bataan syang, sakasa mapili' tu lalangawan tu Taywan kitakit niliwanan a zaysang nu cayay katahkal a icelang. "Taluku" anca "Taluku" uyni a kamu nu Talukucu anipangangan tu "Truku". 16 se-ci tu teban, Seydeyk a tademaw namakayza i Nan-to milakuit tu cung-yang-gan-may malimad mueneng i Kalingku a Takidis Maelil a sauwac, zikuc mueneng i Kalingku a binacadan a patateng', u "Tayluku" kaku sa. uyaan a ngiha "Truku", pikuwanan nu Lipun pangangan han "Taroku" Tayluku a ngangan, zayhan mueneng itini pangangan hantu Tayluku Taluku kanatal aidangan lekakawaw saayaway panukas tu nu ayaway pikuwanan nu Lipun a ziday. 1937 a mihca 12 a buad 27 a demiad, Taywan cung-tu-bu kanatal aidangan wi-yen-huy pasakamu "Taluku kanatal aidangan" patizedng, pasu ayzaay a sye-san atu aluku alala', u hekal katukuh 27 emang kung-cin, nika zayhan pikuwanan nu Lipun mapahezek a palasawaden. 2024 a mihca 4 a bulad 3 a demiad Kalingku manileng maduka t uku Taluku kanatal aidangan, zuma Cuy-lu a zazan, Te-lun a zazan, Yen-ce a zazan, Sa-tutang a zazan, Pay-yang a zazan atu C-mu-sangaw zazan hatiza ku aazihan au malalitin tu likutay a zaza ku nikapelad, mapatay tuku pinaay tu nu midangay a labang atu macapi tu malebut nu midangay a labang malubu i labu nu aidangan. uyza a demiad namalineng Taluku kanatal aidangan mukuwanay pasakamu deban tu ku aidangan sa, misakapah a kawaw kaliyuhan a ayaan, aidangan maedeb katukuh akapah tu sasa platuh a mibuhat. 2024ŚĻī4śúą3śó•, . hekal nu tahak Ťá™ÁĄ∂ÁíįŚĘÉ Taluku kanatal aidangan sawali micapi tu walibayu, cang-yang-san-may amis a ngatu micaliway tu aidangan, aidangan u satalakaway a buyu' 3,742 depah a Nan-hu-ta-san. tulu malebut katalakaw nu buyu' cuedet ku kitizaan u hekal macalap ku liwliw nu kanatal aidanngan tu 7.25% pesen, pasiluc tu ngangan Taywan Py-ye a buyu'mapulung 27 a buyu'an, cacay malebut depah katukuh tulu depah nu alababay kitizaan a buyu' macalap hamina kitizaan 78.4% pesen, matukinih 55% pesan uyni a kitizaan macalap ku 44.7 % pesen ku aidangnan. duduc tu nikinsaan, labu nu aidangan maazih ku aadupan 1,517 alamangan. aidangan izaw ku 46 a lamangan ku micucuay, mcalap ku nu Taywan tukusay pangkiw ku micucucay aadupan. izaw ku 15 a lamangan tungus micidekay nu Taywan aadupan, Taywan nu kilakilangan a edu ahebal ku nikaliwasak. aidangan a ayam saadidi'ay izaw ku 173 a lamangan, pasu hamin nu Taywan micidekay a ayaman 24 a lamangan numa maliwasak i cung-hen zazan Ta-i-lin katukuh Cen-en sayadahay a ayaman itiza. tiniay maazih yadah ku icuwacuwaay a niliwanan a naenengan, tini i Takidis kawana tukus sacumud nu sauwac, Taluku ayaw a paya nu luma' 100 depah pabaw nu satukal a sauwac, micapi tu Taluku kanatal aidangan pilekawaan nu Bu-se niliwanan a naenengan, laed katukuh aayza 2,000 a mihcaan a likisi. labu nu kanatal aidangan Talukucu a niyacu'kaliwasak nu kitizaan, caay kapina ku muenengan, zuma a niyazu' tu malumanay a nikitizaan nayi' tu ku muenengay He-hwan-cin-bung satipan nukanatal aidangan, micapi tu pitu abuyu'an matatules, zuma lima a buyu' singanganay nu Taywan Pay-ye Kilay buyu' tini i satipan nu kanatal aidangan, u talakaw 3,607 depah. Kila buyu' maapilis ku tepah katalawaw a singangan, Taywan u yadahay ku labades a buyu', sisa izaw ku "lumeni'ay Kilay" anipangangan. Ta-pa-cyen-san tini i saamisan nu kanatal aidangan,u talakaw 3,705 depah, sakasepat saatalakaway nu Cung-yang-san-may, atu Ta-pa-cyen-san, Ta-ben-cyen-san pulunng a ngangan "san-cyen", u satalakaway ku san-cyen. . Nan-bu-ta-san tini i saamisan nu kanatal aidangang, u talakaw 3,742 depah. atu I-san, Sye-san,Siw-ku-lan-san, saamisan Ta-u-san pulung a ngnangan "u-I", Taywan nu sitatungusay lima a buyu'an nu talakaway a buyu'. Taluku nisanga'an tu talakaway cuked, Taluku nisanga'an tu talakaway cuked mahiza micumuday tu cung-hen a zazan u piazihan a nipatizengan, u labang tayza i Taluku a diheban I teban nu zazan amihibang pasasing. . Cang-cun-ce nipatizeng u nu Cowng-kow sumamaday Tang a ziday izaw i putah ku pahanhanan miazih wayway, miduduc tu capiay a lala' tu maapilisay nu laed, nicidek ku bangcal. tingalaway nemnem a nanum makay tepatepadan tahkal, masacacay seday mulesi' tasasa, tumihcaan caay kapihibang, masa u "Cang-cun-bey-paw" cung-hen a zazan nu kapahay a piazihan. Yan-c-kow nu Taluku a diheb cacangatu u ba'tu ku tepad, tepad yadah ku adidi'ay a buhang, zayhan hina izaw ku adidi'ay udad padaicaw, yang padaicaw i tepad mikilim tu kakanen ancaysa m isadibu, masa "pay-yen-min-ku" u micidekay aazihan, amala "padaicaw laway" tu. ciw-ci-tung cung-pu hen-kwan a zazan tini mibuhang a patizang, masa yadahay mangangiway a buhang, pangangan tu "Ciw-ci-cung". ,śēÖÁ®Ī"šĻĚśõ≤śīě". Tyen-syang labu nu kitizaan misanga' tu "Tyen-syang yu-ke-cung-sin", atu basu, yubim, Cin-hwa-ciw-ten, Tyen-syang cin-nyen-hu-tung-cung-sin mipawapen tu kakanen atu pilabinan. Ci-suy-twan-ay tini i Ci-suy walian buyu', u talakaw 1000 depah. sakawalu nu tabakiay aazihan nu Taywan. He-ban buyu' kasienawan salenga'c sa ku suleda "mahiniay "suleda niyazu'" a ngangan. ,Áī†śúČ"ťõ™ťĄČ"šĻčÁ®Ī. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan "tar~…ĺuku a kamu *Ňčajan *mita kana kr~…ĺwaan truku" nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kow sakas…ôpat a buju Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan. sakatusa tabakiaj a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais nu kitakit zikuz kanatar~…ĺaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj aazińßan, **** a mińß ¶a ** a d…ômiad ** a bur~…ĺad pasakamu mir~…ĺ…ôkakawaw, **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad patiz…ôŇč tu pikuwanan. tini i sawar~…ĺian, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mir~…ĺakuit tu kaiŇčku, taj ¶iw kuwan, nan-tow a kuwan tur~…ĺu ku sakawawan. r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan izaw ku nu tajwan saajawaj maawasaj tu wir~…ĺi satip matatus a zazan, pamgamgam ańßn ¶uŇč-ńß…ôn zazan. tar~…ĺuk kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan masazumaaj u dińß…ôb atu t…ôpad, u t…ôpad masaapir~…ĺis, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ naji Ē~ ° ku ar~…ĺawaw, "tar~…ĺuku masat…ôz…ôp ku dińß…ôb" makajni asiŇčaŇčan ku tajwan tu war~…ĺu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj aazińßan. ¶aaj kujni, r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan buju Ē~ °aj jadańß ku mar~…ĺiwan a kur~…ĺiaj sauwa ¶ a zidajan nu mauzipaj, mańßiniaj buju Ē~ ° dajdam butiŇč. "tar~…ĺuk kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan" tar~…ĺakaw t…ôpat…ôpadan,masatukar~…ĺ ku sauwa ¶ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku sa ¶umud nu sauwa ¶ ma ¶uŇčdasaj masaupu masapińßpińß atu dińß…ôb ku kasańßiza nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. matatuŇčus nu nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč nu kitait nipatańßkar~…ĺ tatuŇčus sakapitu sijaŇč, atu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tur~…ĺin misauŇčaj tar~…ĺakaw tapabaw, masaŇča Ē~ ° ku tar~…ĺuk dińß…ôb kib…ôtur~…ĺ tar~…ĺakaw ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ aazińßan. mauzipaj jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aan atu mi ¶id…ôkaj matatuŇčus nu nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč nu kitait nipatańßkar~…ĺ tatuŇčus tu sakasiwa sjaŇč, ¶aaj ujni dada Ē~ °,ujni a kitizaan ¶aajnaj kap…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw nujaanaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, mińßibaŇčan a aadupan a r~…ĺamaŇčan atu kajajadańß, masasuida, matatuŇču nu nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč nu kitait nipatańßkar~…ĺ tatuŇčus tu saka ¶a ¶aj a bataan sjaŇč, sakasa mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tu tajwan kitakit nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč nu ¶ajaj katańßkar~…ĺ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. "tar~…ĺuku" an ¶a "tar~…ĺuku" ujni a kamu nu tar~…ĺuku ¶u anipaŇčaŇčan tu "truku". ** s…ô- ¶i tu t…ôban, s…ôd…ôk a tad…ômaw namakajza i nan-to mir~…ĺakuit tu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-gan-maj mar~…ĺimad mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku a takidis ma…ôr~…ĺir~…ĺ a sauwa ¶, ziku ¶ mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku a bina ¶adan a patat…ôŇč Ē~ °, u "tajr~…ĺuku" kaku sa. ujaan a Ňčińßa "truku", pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun paŇčaŇčan ńßan "taroku" tajr~…ĺuku a ŇčaŇčan, zajńßan mu…ôn…ôŇč itini paŇčaŇčan ńßantu tajr~…ĺuku tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw saajawaj panukas tu nu ajawaj pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun a zidaj. **** a mińß ¶a ** a buad ** a d…ômiad, tajwan ¶uŇč-tu-bu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan wi-j…ôn-ńßuj pasakamu "tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan" patiz…ôdŇč, pasu ajzaaj a sj…ô-san atu ar~…ĺuku ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ katukuńß ** …ômaŇč kuŇč- ¶in, nika zajńßan pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun mapańß…ôz…ôk a par~…ĺasawad…ôn. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad kar~…ĺiŇčku manir~…ĺ…ôŇč maduka t uku tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, zuma ¶uj-r~…ĺu a zazan, t…ô-r~…ĺun a zazan, j…ôn- ¶…ô a zazan, sa-tutaŇč a zazan, paj-jaŇč a zazan atu ¶-mu-saŇčaw zazan ńßatiza ku aazińßan au mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu r~…ĺikutaj a zaza ku tar~…ĺuku kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan sawar~…ĺi mi ¶api tu war~…ĺibaju, ¶aŇč-jaŇč-san-maj amis a Ňčatu mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu aidaŇčan, aidaŇčan u satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° *,*** d…ôpańß a nan-ńßu-ta-san. tur~…ĺu °mapur~…ĺuŇč ** a buju Ē~ °an, ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺ…ôbut d…ôpańß katukuńß tur~…ĺu d…ôpańß nu ar~…ĺababaj kitizaan a buju Ē~ ° ma ¶ar~…ĺap ńßamina kitizaan **.*% p…ôs…ôn, matukinińß **% p…ôsan ujni a kitizaan ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku **.* % p…ôs…ôn ku aidaŇčnan. dudu ¶ tu nikinsaan, r~…ĺabu nu aidaŇčan maazińß ku aadupan *,*** ar~…ĺamaŇčan. aidaŇčan izaw ku ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku mi ¶u ¶uaj, m ¶ar~…ĺap ku nu tajwan tukusaj paŇčkiw ku mi ¶u ¶u ¶aj aadupan. izaw ku ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan tuŇčus mi ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan aadupan, tajwan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a …ôdu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nikar~…ĺiwasak. aidaŇčan a ajam saadidi Ē~ °kar~…ĺiwasak nu kitizaan, ¶aaj kapina ku mu…ôn…ôŇčan, zuma a nijazu Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺumanaj a nikitizaan naji Ē~ ° tu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj ńß…ô-ńßwan- ¶in-buŇč satipan nukanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, mi ¶api tu pitu r~…ĺabaŇč tajza i tar~…ĺuku a dińß…ôban i t…ôban nu zazan amińßibaŇč pasasiŇč. . ¶aŇč- ¶un- ¶…ô nipatiz…ôŇč u nu ¶owŇč-kow sumamadaj taŇč a zidaj izaw i putańß ku pańßanńßanan miazińß wajwaj, midudu ¶ tu ¶apiaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu maapir~…ĺisaj nu r~…ĺa…ôd, ni ¶id…ôk ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. tiŇčar~…ĺawaj n…ômn…ôm a nanum makaj t…ôpat…ôpadan tańßkar~…ĺ, masa ¶a ¶aj s…ôdaj mur~…ĺ…ôsi Ē~ ° tasasa, tumińß ¶aan ¶aaj kapińßibaŇč, masa u " ¶aŇč- ¶un-b…ô-paw" ¶uŇč-ńß…ôn a zazan nu kapańßaj a piazińßan. jan- ¶-kow nu tar~…ĺuku a dińß…ôb ¶a ¶aŇčatu u ba Ē~ °tu ku t…ôpad, t…ôpad jadańß ku adidi Ē~ °aj a buńßaŇč, zajńßan ńßina izaw ku adidi Ē~ °aj udad padai ¶aw, jaŇč padai ¶aw i t…ôpad mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn an ¶ajsa m isadibu, masa "paj-j…ôn-min-ku" u mi ¶id…ôkaj aazińßan, amar~…ĺa "padai ¶aw r~…ĺawaj" tu. ¶iw- ¶i-tuŇč ¶uŇč-pu ńß…ôn-kwan a zazan tini mibuńßaŇč a patizaŇč, masa jadańßaj maŇčaŇčiwaj a buńßaŇč, paŇčaŇčan tu " ¶iw- ¶i- ¶uŇč". ,**"***". tj…ôn-sjaŇč r~…ĺabu nu kitizaan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu "tj…ôn-sjaŇč ju-k…ô- ¶uŇč-sin", atu basu, jubim, ¶in-ńßwa- ¶iw-t…ôn, tj…ôn-sjaŇč ¶in-nj…ôn-ńßu-tuŇč- ¶uŇč-sin mipawap…ôn tu kakan…ôn atu pir~…ĺabinan. ¶i-suj-twan-aj tini i ¶i-suj war~…ĺian buju Ē~ °, u tar~…ĺakaw **** d…ôpańß. sakawar~…ĺu nu tabakiaj aazińßan nu tajwan. ńß…ô-ban buju Ē~ ° kasi…ônawan sar~…ĺ…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶ sa ku sur~…ĺ…ôda "mańßiniaj "sur~…ĺ…ôda nijazu Ē~ °" a ŇčaŇčan. ,**"**"**. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj natin…ôŇčan
